race.comment: RAMASIS (8) finished full of running on debut here two weeks ago. Is sure to have come on from that and will relish the rise in trip. Doubt he gets denied again. JUMBO JET (6) is a Wootton Bassett gelding out of Adelaide Guineas (2019) winner So We Are on debut for Phillip Stokes. Has come along nicely in his lead-up work and keeps Opperman. Bright start anticipated. SICILIAN PRINCESS (13) hasn't met market expectations in her two runs back but strips fitter third-up and is from a sharp stable, so is worth keeping safe. THUNDARA (14) makes her stable debut for the Bain & Taylor partnership. Comes over from NZ after working home nicely on debut at Tauranga on Jan 2. Kept legs ticking over with a trial at headquarters. Don't dismiss.
